# AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClip

**Object**

The relationship to the App Clips resource you set with the request that creates an Advanced App Clip Experiences resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClip
```

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClip.Data**: The type and ID of the App Clips resource that you’re relating with the Advanced App Clip Experiences resource you’re creating.

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.HeaderImage**: The relationship to the App Clip Header Images resource you set with the request that creates an Advanced App Clip Experiences resource.
- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.Localizations**: The relationship to the Advanced App Clip Experience Localizations resource you set with the request that creates an Advanced App Clip Experiences resource.
